images.caption:
Figure 1:Overview ofOnline Adaptation to Continual Knowledge Streams.
At each time intervaltt, a new context chunkctc_{t}is streamed, and the model is queried with context accumulated up tottand a questionqjq_{j}.
Performance is calculated as average accuracy across all intervals by comparing predictions with the ground truth answerata_{t}, then averaging over all questions.
A PhaseTiT_{i}denotes a contiguous set of chunks sharing the same ground truth answers.
Answer options are limited toOAKS-N, asOAKS-B uses an open-ended format.
Figure 2:Accuracy (%) across different question types ofOAKS-B.
Figure 3:Accuracy (%) across the timestep where the question is asked.
